title: Selection of special counsel
doc_html:
§22.  Selection of special counsel

The governor and the Attorney General, or either of them, in his discretion, may select the special counsel provided for in R.S. 49:21 and fix compensation.
doc_text:
§22.  Selection of special counsel
The governor and the Attorney General, or either of them, in his discretion, may select the special counsel provided for in R.S. 49:21 and fix compensation.
